projectDescription: A Gradio-based GUI and CLI for training Stable Diffusion models using LoRA, DreamBooth, fine-tuning, and more, supporting SD1.x, SDXL, Flux.1, and SD3.
keyFeatures: Gradio-based web GUI for configuring and launching SD training scripts
LoRA training with support for Standard, DyLoRA, LoHa, LoCon, LyCORIS variants
DreamBooth training with class+identifier and captioning methods
Fine-tuning (full model) with metadata-based dataset configuration
SDXL, Flux.1, and SD3 model training support
Multi-platform: Windows, Linux, macOS, Docker, Runpod, Novita, Google Colab
Automatic captioning with BLIP, BLIP2, WD14Tagger, GIT, and manual tools
Sample image generation during training for progress monitoring
TOML-based config files for reproducible training runs
Multi-GPU and headless/server mode support via Accelerate
publicApiSurface: gui.sh / gui.bat / gui-uv.sh / gui-uv.bat — launch scripts
kohya_gui.py — main entrypoint with CLI options (--listen, --server_port, --config, --headless, --share, etc.)
config.toml — user configuration file for default paths and settings
dataset .toml — dataset configuration for training scripts
